title: workflow_step
description: Emitted twice per node: once when status=running (node begins), once when status∈done|error|skipped|timeout (node ends). FE updates the matching row by idx. PHASE-TWB-WORKFLOW W1 (2026-06-19).

node_id.description: Unique node identifier within the graph.

node_kind.description: Block kind, e.g. action.search_kg, llm.compose, trigger.manual.

idx.description: 0-based index of this node in topological order.

ms.description: Execution time of this node in milliseconds (only on final status).

output_summary.description: Short human-readable summary of node output (≤120 chars).
